mdSummary:
# InputMask

Masked input for phone numbers, dates, and custom patterns.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/input-mask

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| InputMask | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| InputMask | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| InputMask | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| InputMask | Mask | `string` | `""` |  |
| InputMask | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| InputMask | PromptChar | `char` | `'_'` |  |
| InputMask | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| InputMask | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| InputMask | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| InputMask | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| InputMask | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| InputMask | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| InputMask | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| InputMask | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| InputMask | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
- `Backspace` — HandleKeyDown handles Backspace in InputMask.razor

## Example
```razor
<InputMask />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/InputMask/InputMask.razor`
